title: Goofy Goobers Modpack
description: A goofy modpack I made for some goofy goobers
body:
A modpack I made for my friends.  I'm tired of having to give them a file so I'm just going to make one modpack that I can update.

This modpack is meant to enhance vanilla while adding some mods I see that I think are pretty cool.  A mix of magic, technology, FPS mods, exploration, and some entirely new overhauls to change up the game a bit.

Some mods going to be included are:
+ JEI
+ Sodium + Other Optimation mods
+ New Structures
+ Yung's Better Mods collection
+ Technology/Create
+ New Armor & Tools
+ More :D

(Going to be gradually updated with new mods as I feel like, or with mods my friends would like to see added)
